title: melastoma depauperatum
intro: Melastoma depauperatum, also known as the lesser melastoma, is a plant species in the family Melastomataceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions due to its active compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. In traditional herbal preparations, Melastoma depauperatum is often made into teas, infusions, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
